RNKEXPORTS.DescChat: Export chat streams, threads, or individual messages to a ZIP file.
RNKEXPORTS.DescJournals: Export journal entries and pages into a structured archive.
RNKEXPORTS.DescCompendia: Export compendium packs (items, actors, journals, macros) to a ZIP bundle.
RNKEXPORTS.DescFolders: Select folders from the Foundry data tree and export their JSON contents as a ZIP.
RNKEXPORTS.OptionSplitFiles: Export each entry as its own file (nested folders)
RNKEXPORTS.DescCompendiaImport: Choose a JSON export file (created by RNK Exports) to import its contents into this world.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.NoImportFile: Please select a JSON file to import.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.ImportFailed: Import failed. See console for details.
RNKEXPORTS.Settings.DebugHint: Enable debug console output for export operations.
RNKEXPORTS.Settings.DefaultFolderHint: Path to use when browsing folders (data/ by default).
RNKEXPORTS.Settings.IncludeReadableTextH: When enabled, exports add a .txt version of JSON exports for easier viewing.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.ExportComplete: Export complete. Download should start automatically.
RNKEXPORTS.Notifications.FolderSelection: Please select a folder before exporting.
RNKEXPORTS.HubSubtitle: A GM hub for exporting and importing game data.
RNKEXPORTS.SplitFilesLabel: Split files (one JSON per entry / item)
RNKEXPORTS.ExportAllDesc: Export chat, journals, and compendia in one operation
RNKEXPORTS.PanelExportDesc: Run exports below. Use split files to create one JSON file per object.
RNKEXPORTS.PanelImportDesc: Import strict JSON exports and create documents in world folders.
RNKEXPORTS.Import.NoResults: No documents were created during import.
RNKEXPORTS.PanelSettingsDesc: Adjust preferences for exports, imports, and default paths.
RNKEXPORTS.Dialog.FolderSelectDesc: Enter the data path you want to export (e.g., data/journal).
